title: France 24 Analysis: What Magyar's Election Win Means for Hungary's Economy and Europe
detail: France 24's People & Profit program examines the economic and geopolitical implications of Peter Magyar's electoral victory over Viktor Orbán. The analysis covers expected shifts in Hungary's economic policy, including potential re-engagement with EU cohesion funds frozen under Orbán, improved relations with Brussels, and implications for Hungary's role within the eurozone. Analysts assess how Magyar's win could reshape Hungary's bilateral ties with European partners and affect investment flows into the country.

title: EU Rushes to Unlock Billions for Hungary as Magyar Prepares to Take Power
detail: The European Union is moving quickly to release billions of euros in previously frozen funds for Hungary as opposition leader Péter Magyar prepares to assume power following his election victory over Viktor Orbán. Brussels had withheld the funds over rule-of-law concerns during the Orbán era, and the anticipated leadership transition is accelerating EU efforts to re-engage with Budapest and restore the financial flows.
